notes: iter14 HAR-driven 4-event schema (project_start -> message_start -> message_field_delta(content) -> message_result) STILL fails to render '차단'. Engine intercept clearly fired (ask_proxy returned status 200, 0.8 kB, ~4 ms — far smaller/faster than a genuine genspark response). Frontend choked: JS error 'Unexpected token \'d\', "data: [DONE]" is not valid JSON' appears above chat, and the assistant bubble shows generic '응답 생성 중 오류가 발생했습니다.' + '응답 다시 생성' button — NOT our warning text. Iter14 is closer than iter7-13: those produced silent no-render, this one at least triggers genspark's error UI, but the parser explicitly rejects the 'data: [DONE]' terminator line. Hypothesis: real genspark stream emits raw JSON lines per SSE event (no 'data:' prefix on the terminator, or no [DONE] sentinel at all). HAR sample #1031 should be re-inspected to confirm exact line format / terminator. Schema axes still untested: (a) omit data: [DONE] terminator entirely, (b) embed DONE as a structured event, (c) match exact line framing from HAR (raw JSON each line vs. SSE 'data: ' prefix).
